ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "education_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "black" INTEGER /* Indicator for whether the participant is Black (1) or not (0) */,
  "hispanic" INTEGER /* Indicator for whether the participant is Hispanic (1) or not (0) */,
  "married" INTEGER /* Indicator for whether the participant is married (1) or not (0) */,
  "nodegree" INTEGER /* Indicator for whether the participant has no degree (1) or not (0) */,
  "treatment_group" INTEGER /* Indicator for whether the participant is in the treatment group (1) or control group (0) */,
  "disability_status" INTEGER /* Indicator for whether the participant has a disability (1) or not (0) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language spoken at home */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Number of people in the participant's household */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic outcome record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the income data */,
  "income" REAL /* Income amount for the specified year */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status (employed, unemployed, self-employed) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry/sector where the participant is employed */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_outcomes_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "program_start_date" TEXT /* Date the participant started the program */,
  "program_end_date" TEXT /* Date the participant completed the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program the participant is enrolled in */,
  "program_location" TEXT /* Location where the program is being offered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_participation_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant (e.g., Male, Female, Other) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant (e.g., African American, Asian, White) */,
  "income_category" TEXT /* Income category (e.g., Low, Middle, High) */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., Employed, Unemployed, Self-employed) */,
  "citizenship_status" TEXT /* Citizenship status (citizen, non-citizen, permanent resident) */,
  "transportation_access" INTEGER /* Indicator for whether the participant has access to reliable transportation (1) or not (0) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "external_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data record */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the external data (e.g., Bureau of Labor Statistics, Census Bureau) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of external data (e.g., Economic Indicator, Labor Market Statistic) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the external data */,
  "data_url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the external data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_evaluation" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was conducted */,
  "evaluation_score" REAL /* Score or rating from the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_method" TEXT /* Method used for evaluation (e.g., survey, interview, observation) */,
  "evaluation_results" TEXT /* Detailed results of the evaluation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_evaluation_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., Lead Researcher, Data Analyst) */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)
